name: CTK Cosmetics Co., Ltd
summary: CTK Cosmetics Co., Ltd manufactures and sells cosmetics and cosmetic containers in South Korea and internationally. The company was formerly known as CMI Taieka Korea Co., Ltd. and changed its name to CTK Cosmetics Co., Ltd in 2001. CTK Cosmetics Co., Ltd was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
